mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase borrowing costs and compress equity valuations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive mean when FEDFUNDS increases, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions, triggering negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward 5-day returns are positive in > 55% of instances where UNRATE rises > 0.2pp.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer demand expansion, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive changes in RSAFS and HOUST yield negative mean 20-day returns, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in the index of industrial production above its 12-month moving average reflects expanding productive capacity, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO above its 12-month trend fails to predict positive 60-day returns, with out-of-sample R-squared below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly inflation exceeding 0.4% forces expectations of tighter monetary policy, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: High inflation months consistently coincide with positive 20-day SPX returns, or the signal loses predictive power when FEDFUNDS is below 1.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in total nonfarm payrolls and decreases in the unemployment rate confirm robust labor market tightening, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative mean returns in > 50% of occurrences, or the interaction effect vanishes in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP signals expanding economic output, which translates to positive corporate earnings expectations and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth rates are followed by negative 5-day SPX returns in > 60% of cases, or Rank IC remains below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive monthly declines in industrial production indicate a supply-side contraction that reduces corporate revenue prospects, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Consecutive INDPRO declines fail to predict negative 60-day returns, with mean forward returns exceeding +0.5% annually.
